# vector: hello_resp
# HELLO_RESP: versions, build_hash, firmware name, tick_hz, capabilities, project metadata, MCU model, and Scope resources
# raw  = frame before COBS (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, all LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 delimiter, the actual SCI-link octets
raw: 5a8100010054000a000e00ebb6cc080a00000076696577657232303030000000000000204e00007f0000007068617365342d64656d6f00000000000000000000000000000000000000000000d8356a010010000a00000000700000cea96dcb
wire: 035a8102010254020a020e06ebb6cc080a01010b76696577657232303030010101010103204e01027f01010c7068617365342d64656d6f01010101010101010101010101010101010101010105d8356a010210020a01010102700105cea96dcb00
